global.description: The ad features a bright green background with interactive gameplay elements and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Encourages users to engage with the game and claim rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: IronQuest UGC
elements.description: Bold, large text at the top of the ad, prominently displaying the title 'IronQuest UGC' in a dark color against a bright background.

elements.label: Gameplay interface
elements.description: A rectangular section in the center showing a simplified gameplay interface with empty slots and a right arrow, suggesting interactivity.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element at the top, possibly a graphic or icon, with a light color that blends into the background.

elements.label: Gameplay interface
elements.description: Another rectangular section in the center displaying a similar gameplay interface with empty slots, reinforcing the interactive aspect.

elements.label: Top left icon
elements.description: A small icon or graphic located at the top left, visually minimalistic and light in color.

elements.label: Top right icon
elements.description: A small icon or graphic at the top right, visually minimalistic and light in color.

elements.label: Top center icon
elements.description: A tiny decorative element in the top center area, possibly an icon, with a light color.

elements.label: Center icon
elements.description: A small decorative element in the center area, possibly an icon, with a light color.

elements.label: Top left small icon
elements.description: A tiny icon or graphic located at the top left, visually minimalistic and light in color.

elements.label: Center small icon
elements.description: A tiny icon or graphic in the center area, visually minimalistic and light in color.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: Bold, large text at the bottom of the ad stating 'Level up today No ads in first week' in a dark color against a bright background.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom with the text 'Claim reward' in a contrasting color, inviting user interaction.
elements.text_content: Level up today No ads in first week

elements.label: Reward message
elements.description: Smaller text at the bottom of the ad stating 'Claim reward' in a dark color against a bright background.
